R1
RACING
rabbit r1 edition
touch screen to start
🏎 🏁 🏎

HOW TO RACE

▲ Scroll UP Steer up ▼ Scroll DOWN Steer down ● Side btn Brake

Auto-accelerates to top speed.
Off-road slows you down.
8 hits = game over!

Beat the timer each lap.
Grab ⏱ for time & ♥ for health.
More cars join every 2 laps!

▲ Scroll to race!
WRECKED! ▲ Scroll to retry
